news.title:
Tata Communications issued ₹750 Cr Commercial Paper on March 25, 2026.
The CP, redeemable on April 24, 2026, has a discount rate of 7.9% p.a.
news.summary:
Tata Communications issued ₹750 Cr Commercial Paper on March 25, 2026.
The CP, redeemable on April 24, 2026, has a discount rate of 7.9% p.a.

news.title:
Tata Communications, a strategic Formula 1 broadcast partner, leverages its 500,000 km subsea cables for digital expansion.
Recent acquisitions, AI cloud offerings, and partnerships like JLR highlight its shift to an AI-first, digital services focus.
news.summary:
Tata Communications, a strategic Formula 1 broadcast partner, leverages its 500,000 km subsea cables for digital expansion.
Recent acquisitions, AI cloud offerings, and partnerships like JLR highlight its shift to an AI-first, digital services focus.

news.title:
Tata Communications affirms compliance with SEBI LODR norms, ensuring timely disclosures.
The company states it cannot comment on share price/volume movements as shares are freely traded.
news.summary:
Tata Communications affirms compliance with SEBI LODR norms, ensuring timely disclosures.
The company states it cannot comment on share price/volume movements as shares are freely traded.

news.title:
Tata Communications unveils Izo™ DC Dynamic Connectivity Platform with self-healing network.
The platform enhances connectivity, ensuring over 99.99% service availability.
news.summary:
Tata Communications unveils Izo™ DC Dynamic Connectivity Platform with self-healing network.
The platform enhances connectivity, ensuring over 99.99% service availability.

news.title:
TATA Communications forms JV with Shanghai Runshengtong to boost services in China.
The collaboration aims to enhance service offerings in the Chinese market.
news.summary:
TATA Communications forms JV with Shanghai Runshengtong to boost services in China.
The collaboration aims to enhance service offerings in the Chinese market.

news.title:
Tata Communications to close an indirect subsidiary contributing ₹766.7 Cr revenue, ₹790.2 Cr assets in FY25.
The closure is scheduled to take effect from February 16, 2026.
news.summary:
Tata Communications to close an indirect subsidiary contributing ₹766.7 Cr revenue, ₹790.2 Cr assets in FY25.
The closure is scheduled to take effect from February 16, 2026.

news.title:
Tata Communications dissolved its indirect subsidiary, BUC Mobile Inc., effective February 16, 2026.
BUC Mobile contributed 3.3% turnover (₹766.7 crore) and 12.9% net worth (₹790.15 crore) in FY25.
news.summary:
Tata Communications dissolved its indirect subsidiary, BUC Mobile Inc., effective February 16, 2026.
BUC Mobile contributed 3.3% turnover (₹766.7 crore) and 12.9% net worth (₹790.15 crore) in FY25.

news.title:
Tata Communications raises ₹300 Cr via commercial paper to boost liquidity.
Funds will support the company's operational strategy.
news.summary:
Tata Communications raises ₹300 Cr via commercial paper to boost liquidity.
Funds will support the company's operational strategy.

news.title:
Tata Communications issued ₹300 crore commercial paper maturing May 22, 2026, at a 7.1% annual discount rate.
Face value per paper is ₹5,00,000; issuance date was Feb 20, 2026.
news.summary:
Tata Communications issued ₹300 crore commercial paper maturing May 22, 2026, at a 7.1% annual discount rate.
Face value per paper is ₹5,00,000; issuance date was Feb 20, 2026.

news.title:
Tata Communications and RailTel ally to enhance India's digital infrastructure using RailTel's 63,000 km fiber network.
Collaboration focuses on network upgrades, cybersecurity, AI, and improved customer experience for faster, secure services.
news.summary:
Tata Communications and RailTel ally to enhance India's digital infrastructure using RailTel's 63,000 km fiber network.
Collaboration focuses on network upgrades, cybersecurity, AI, and improved customer experience for faster, secure services.

news.title: Tata Communications and TCS are creating AI operating systems for industries.
news.summary: Tata Communications and TCS are creating AI operating systems for industries.

news.title:
Tata Communications appoints Siddhartha Mundra as CFO effective May 1, 2026.
Current CFO Kabir Ahmed Shakir to step down on April 30, 2026.
news.summary:
Tata Communications appoints Siddhartha Mundra as CFO effective May 1, 2026.
Current CFO Kabir Ahmed Shakir to step down on April 30, 2026.

news.title:
Tata Communications CFO Kabir Ahmed Shakir resigns, effective date to be announced.
The company is initiating steps to identify a successor for smooth transition.
news.summary:
Tata Communications CFO Kabir Ahmed Shakir resigns, effective date to be announced.
The company is initiating steps to identify a successor for smooth transition.

news.title:
Tata Communications launched AI-focused platforms to support enterprise AI scaling.
CEO Amur S Lakshminarayanan expects up to $1M topline addition from the platforms.
news.summary:
Tata Communications launched AI-focused platforms to support enterprise AI scaling.
CEO Amur S Lakshminarayanan expects up to $1M topline addition from the platforms.

news.title:
Tata Communications launches AI-ready platforms for enterprises, including Multi Cloud Network, Edge Distribution, and ThreadSpan.
The suite focuses on scalability, security, and cost reduction, enhancing AI deployment confidence for businesses.
news.summary:
Tata Communications launches AI-ready platforms for enterprises, including Multi Cloud Network, Edge Distribution, and ThreadSpan.
The suite focuses on scalability, security, and cost reduction, enhancing AI deployment confidence for businesses.

news.title:
Tata Comm board approves splitting non-licensed business for efficiency.
Fully owned subsidiaries to be merged to streamline operations.
news.summary:
Tata Comm board approves splitting non-licensed business for efficiency.
Fully owned subsidiaries to be merged to streamline operations.

news.title:
Tata Communications aims for digital portfolio profitability by FY28.
CEO highlights focus on AI-led services and SaaS offerings for growth.
news.summary:
Tata Communications aims for digital portfolio profitability by FY28.
CEO highlights focus on AI-led services and SaaS offerings for growth.

news.title:
Tata Comm's Dec 2025 net sales rose 6.7% YoY to Rs 6,188.9 cr; net profit surged 54.8% YoY to Rs 365.3 cr.
EBITDA grew 22.9% YoY to Rs 1,487.4 cr; EPS increased to Rs 12.8 from Rs 8.3. Shares closed at Rs 1,617.8 on Jan 20, 2026.
news.summary:
Tata Comm's Dec 2025 net sales rose 6.7% YoY to Rs 6,188.9 cr; net profit surged 54.8% YoY to Rs 365.3 cr.
EBITDA grew 22.9% YoY to Rs 1,487.4 cr; EPS increased to Rs 12.8 from Rs 8.3. Shares closed at Rs 1,617.8 on Jan 20, 2026.

news.title: CLSA downgrades Tata Communications target price to Rs 2165, signaling caution.
news.summary: CLSA downgrades Tata Communications target price to Rs 2165, signaling caution.

news.title:
Tata Communications targets 20%+ growth in NextGen connectivity, cloud, security, CIS, and media segments.
MOVE and IoT segments will focus on profitability over growth, per management update.
news.summary:
Tata Communications targets 20%+ growth in NextGen connectivity, cloud, security, CIS, and media segments.
MOVE and IoT segments will focus on profitability over growth, per management update.
